    descriptionI'm impressed that you actually succeeded ...Well then, to reach a new rank within our guild you have to improve your reputation. You can do it by any means you see fit ... Come back again when you reach 500 reputation and you'll recieve an increased share of our takings. Just a note ... we're working on developing a new raiding weapon, if you continue to prove yourself worthy you might even get to try it sometime in the future.
